name: Kakaako Waterfront Park
tagline: Grassy slopes for rolling, ocean views, and open space for running — a simple, free park locals love.
bestTime: Late afternoon for ocean breezes and sunset views; weekday mornings for fewer people
talkStory: Good for all ages. The grassy hill is the main attraction for kids — they'll roll down it for hours. Great kite-flying spot when trade winds are up. No playground equipment, but the open space is perfect for balls, frisbees, and picnics. Pair with a visit to the Children's Discovery Center right across the street. No swimming — the rocky shoreline is for looking only. Restrooms available.
